nasb.text: Moreover, Hushai said, “You know your father and his men, that they are mighty men and they are fierce, like a bear robbed of her cubs in the field. And your father is an expert in warfare, and will not spend the night with the people.

esv.text: Hushai said, “You know that your father and his men are mighty men, and that they are enraged,  like a bear robbed of her cubs in the field. Besides, your father is expert in war; he will not spend the night with the people.

cnv.text: 戶篩又說：“你知道你父親和那些跟隨他的人都是勇士；他們心裡正在惱怒，好像野地裡喪子的母熊一樣；並且你父親是個戰士，必不會與眾人在一起住宿。

ccb.text: 你知道你父亲和他的部下，他们都是勇士，现在他们就像丢了熊崽的母熊一样凶猛。况且你父亲是个身经百战的人，他一定不会跟部下睡在一处。
